introduce.title: What is Vector
introduce.label: Introduce
introduce.description: Vector is a native LLM-powered FAE built for semiconductor companies and distributors. It activates your technical knowledge base and delivers expert-level answers to engineers worldwide — instantly, 24/7.

items.title: Deep Datasheet Reasoning
items.description: Understand parameters, limits, and trade-offs across datasheets and app notes — with FAE-grade explanations.

items.title: Cross-SKU Alternatives & BOM Guidance
items.description: Recommend substitutes and second-source options with clear rationale to lock BOMs earlier in the design cycle.

items.title: 50+ Languages, One Global Center
items.description: Engineers ask in their native language; Vector retrieves global docs and answers precisely — no translation loss.

items.title: Always-on, Near-zero Marginal Cost
items.description: Serve the global Mass Market with consistent support quality without adding headcount.

benefits.title: Why Teams Choose Vector
benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.description: Vector turns technical support from a cost center into a design-in growth engine — for both KA and Mass Market.

items.title: Scale FAE Expertise Beyond Top KA
items.description: Deliver consistent, expert-level guidance to thousands of engineers without overloading your senior FAEs.

items.title: Capture the Moment of Intent
items.description: Instant answers at the exact time decisions are made — reduce drop-off and prevent design-ins from shifting to competitors.

items.title: From Support to Revenue
items.description: Shorten time-to-sample, increase conversion, and lock BOMs earlier with AI-driven guidance across the full design cycle.

usage.title: How to Deploy Vector
usage.description: Launch a native LLM-powered FAE in weeks — not quarters:

items.description: Import datasheets, app notes, FAQs, reference designs, and internal playbooks.

items.title: Configure Products & Taxonomy

items.title: Embed Everywhere Engineers Ask
items.description: Deploy on docs site, distributor portals, community, and internal tools — with APIs and widgets.

items.title: Measure & Improve
items.description: Track intent, topics, and conversion signals to continuously improve answers and unlock more design-ins.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Have another question? Talk to our team.
faq.tip: Can't find what you're looking for? Request a demo and we'll walk you through a pilot.

items.question: What does "native LLM-powered FAE" mean?
items.answer: Vector is not a traditional support workflow with AI added on. It is an FAE role redefined around large language models — able to read datasheets, reason across technical documents, and guide engineers at the moment of design-in.

items.question: What content can Vector learn from?
items.answer: Datasheets, application notes, reference designs, FAQs, training materials, and internal playbooks. Vector can also be configured with SKU taxonomies and alternative-part mappings.

items.question: Can Vector support global customers in multiple languages?
items.answer: Yes. Vector supports 50+ languages. Engineers can ask in their native language; Vector retrieves information from your documentation and responds with technical accuracy.

items.question: Where can we deploy Vector?
items.answer: Common deployments include documentation sites, distributor portals, community forums, and internal support tools. Vector can be embedded via widgets and accessed programmatically via APIs.

items.question: How does Vector help increase revenue, not just reduce cost?
items.answer: Vector captures design-in moments with instant answers, reduces drop-off, recommends alternatives to prevent churn, and shortens time-to-sample — increasing conversion from documentation traffic to real design wins.

items.question: How do you handle security and access control?
items.answer: Vector supports enterprise controls such as SSO, access control, and audit logs. Deployment options can be tailored to your security requirements.
